missing_external_entities.title: {count} required entities are missing
missing_external_entities.description:
The area_lighting integration expects the following entities to exist in Home Assistant, but they are missing:

{missing_list}

Without these, features depending on them are disabled or degraded (holiday detection, ambient zones, motion lighting, circadian sensor readings).

### Copy-paste bootstrap

Add this to your `configuration.yaml` (or a package file) to create the missing helpers:

```yaml
{bootstrap_yaml}
```

After saving the file, reload the affected integrations or restart Home Assistant. See the component README for full setup details.

lighting_on.name: Turn on area lighting
lighting_on.description: Turns on lighting for an area, cycling through scenes intelligently based on the current state, holiday mode, night mode, and sun position.

lighting_off.name: Turn off area lighting
lighting_off.description: Turns off lighting for an area. Falls back to the ambient scene when ambience is enabled and the area isn't already in an ambience-owned state.

lighting_off_fade.name: Fade off area lighting
lighting_off_fade.description: Turns off lighting for an area with a fade transition. Used by motion/occupancy timer expiry.

lighting_favorite.name: Activate favorite scene
lighting_favorite.description: Activates the favorite scene for an area. Cycles between the active holiday scene (if any) and the night scene.

lighting_raise.name: Raise area brightness
lighting_raise.description: Raises brightness of the lights that are currently on in the area by the configured brightness step percentage. Marks the area as dimmed without losing its scene identity.

lighting_lower.name: Lower area brightness
lighting_lower.description: Lowers brightness of the lights that are currently on in the area by the configured brightness step percentage. Marks the area as dimmed without losing its scene identity. No-op when the area is off.

lighting_circadian.name: Activate circadian lighting
lighting_circadian.description: Activates circadian lighting for an area (enables the circadian_lighting switches and applies their brightness/color temperature to the lights).

snapshot_scene.name: Snapshot area scene
snapshot_scene.description: Captures the current light states in an area and saves them as the definition for the named scene. Adjust lights to the desired levels before calling this.

scene.name: Scene slug
scene.description: The scene slug to overwrite (e.g., daylight, evening, night, ambient).
